termsAndConditions.title: Terms & Conditions
termsAndConditions.bodyPlaceholder: Full Terms & Conditions copy goes here. This placeholder will be replaced with the final legal copy before launch.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to Tappd, a point-of-sale platform designed to help businesses accept payments, manage transactions, and operate their retail operations efficiently. These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Tappd mobile and tablet application, related services, and website (collectively, the "Service"). By creating an account, downloading the application, or using Tappd, you agree to these Terms.

about.title: 1. About Tappd
about.body: Tappd provides software that allows merchants to accept and process payments, manage sales transactions, track inventory and reporting, and integrate with supported payment processors and hardware. Tappd does not directly hold or process funds unless explicitly stated, and payment processing may be provided through third-party payment partners.

eligibility.title: 2. Eligibility
eligibility.body: To use Tappd you must be at least 18 years old, have the legal authority to operate a business or accept payments, and provide accurate and complete account information.

terms.helper: Please read the terms and conditions carefully
